Crop Name: fababean

Profile
- Season type: medium-season (TSUM total=2284 C.d)
- Temperature adaptation: cool-adapted (TBASEM=0.00 C)
- Development driver: temperature + daylength (IDSL=1, DLO=14.00 h)
- Root/water trait: moderately deep-rooted, more drought-tolerant (RDMCR=100.00 cm, DEPNR=4.50)
- Assimilation trait: lower assimilation potential (AMAX peak=35.00)
- Storage allocation: mid storage allocation (FOTB onset DVS=1.00)

Nutrient capacity proxies (leaf maxima)
- NMAXLV: DVS0=0.0600, DVS1=0.0350
- PMAXLV: DVS0=0.0096, DVS1=0.0056
- KMAXLV: DVS0=0.0720, DVS1=0.0420

Use guidance
- Treat this as prior knowledge for zero-shot policy transfer.
- Final action should still adapt to current weather/soil observations.
